description: Public-safe subset of the full 30-task cleaned, preserved-ratio, benchmark-ready IDS surface: 17 downloadable CSVs are redistributed and 13 tasks are metadata-only omissions for local reproduction.
split_policy: Classwise temporal train/test split with test_size=0.5 and val_size=0.0, as specified by the benchmark definition. Downloadable CSVs are the full cleaned selected rows; omitted tasks retain the same count/split metadata and exact benchmark source paths for local reproduction. Benchmark runners reconstruct train/test splits from the definition and row order.

datasets.title: CIC-IDS-2017 Friday Bot vs BENIGN

datasets.redistribution_caveat: Included with conservative CIC provenance: CIC policy pages appear to allow redistribution with citation, but this release does not relicense the upstream corpus and derivative-subset rights are not expressed as a standard open-data license.

public_release_policy.license_position: This repository does not relicense upstream IDS corpora. Downloadable CSVs are included only where the documented release posture is comparatively stronger; omitted tasks remain documented for local reproduction from the benchmark repo and user-controlled source access.
